strengths: 20+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, embedded, infrastructure, and tooling
Active AI-agent and MCP framework contribution in current role demonstrates genuine builder engagement with AI
Consistent entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, public conference talks, and community workshops
concerns: AI/ML depth is thin and very recent — no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale prior to 2025
Career ceiling is senior/staff IC execution; no evidence of director-level strategic advisory or customer-facing influence
No cloud platform expertise or experience guiding strategic customers and partners on technology adoption
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, well-rounded engineer with a long track record and genuine interest in AI tooling, but this role requires a recognized AI strategist operating at director level — someone with a portfolio of AI-powered products, cloud platform depth, and a demonstrated ability to shape organizational direction and advise strategic customers. His AI exposure is limited to very recent MCP and agentic tooling work, his seniority has plateaued at staff/senior, and there is no evidence of cloud platform expertise or external advisory influence. The raw years of experience meet the minimum bar, but the most critical differentiating criteria are largely absent.
